governingBody: List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a authorities
reasonSummary: Confiscated by the Mannheim Regional Court in November 1994. Unofficial title translation: Auschwitz - Confessions of Perpetrators and Eyewitnesses of the Holocaust
